transport.not_connected.hint: The MCP router cannot reach the Godot daemon WebSocket (:6505 by default).
steps: Open the target Godot project and enable the TerraVolt MCP addon (listen on TCP :6505).
If you only need parity methods (`ping`, `server.info`), start the project's headless session via MCP `headless.start_project`.
Confirm firewall / VPN is not blocking localhost; try `TERRAVOLT_GODOT_HOST` / `--godot-host`.

headless.binary_missing.hint: Headless tooling needs a Godot 4 executable on PATH or `--godot-binary` / `TERRAVOLT_GODOT_BINARY`.
steps: Install Godot 4 CLI or Desktop build and expose it on PATH, or pass `--godot-binary` with the full exe path.
On Windows verify the path targets the executable you use for `-headless` (often `*_console_win64.exe`).

headless.no_project.hint: Headless routing needs a `.godot` project root.
steps: Pass `--project` or set `TERRAVOLT_PROJECT_PATH` to your game folder.
Or invoke `headless.start_project` with an explicit absolute project path.

headless.spawn_failed.hint: OS rejected starting the Godot child process.
steps: Retry with `--godot-binary` pointing directly at the executable.
Check antivirus / execution policy blocking child processes.
Confirm the `--path` argument is valid and writable.

headless.driver_handshake_failed.hint: Driver script did not print `TERRAVOLT_HEADLESS_PORT` before the boot timeout expired.
steps: Ensure addon `packages/godot-mcp-addon/headless/headless_driver.gd` remains reachable and `-script` path resolves.
Increase `--headless-boot-timeout-ms` if cold starts exceed the default budget.

headless.session_busy.hint: Only one bundled headless session is supported at once.
steps: Call `headless.stop` before spawning another project/session.
Or wait for async headless RPCs to finish before starting a conflicting session.

headless.crashed.hint: Godot exited non-zero during a headless op.
steps: Check daemon logs / stderr from the spawned process for scripting errors.
Reproduce with `--headless-boot-timeout-ms` raised to distinguish boot vs crash.

headless.timeout.hint: A daemon or headless call exceeded timeouts.
steps: Bump `--request-timeout-ms` and `--headless-op-timeout-ms` for slow exports or imports.
Split large work batches into smaller tool calls.

headless.disallowed.hint: The requested path or RPC is outside the TerraVolt allowlist.
steps: Prefer registry-backed daemon methods rather than arbitrary file paths.
Point `--project` at the intended sandbox root instead of escaping upward.
Run `npm run catalog:sync`, restart MCP router and the Godot editor.
If using a submodule copy of the addon, regenerate `_generated` catalog GD.

scene.path_not_found.hint: The requested `.tscn` / `.scn` path does not exist under the project.
steps: Run `scene.list` to enumerate available scenes.
Use `scene.create` to create the file, or fix the path to an existing `res://` resource.

editor.not_available.hint: This method requires the Godot editor with the TerraVolt addon connected.
steps: Open the project in Godot and enable the TerraVolt MCP addon (WebSocket :6505).
For headless-capable alternatives, use `scene.create` / `project.set_settings` via `headless.start_project`.

editor.no_active_scene.hint: No scene is open in the editor (or headless has no edited root).
steps: Call `scene.open` in the editor first.
Or use `scene.get` / `scene.create` for file-level operations without an active tab.

node.property_unknown.hint: The property name is not on the node's property list.
steps: Call `node.get` with `properties: "all"` to inspect valid keys.
Use exported/script variable names exactly as shown in the editor.

expression.forbidden_identifier.hint: Sandboxed expressions cannot reference OS, File, DirAccess, etc.
steps: Rewrite the expression using only node properties and literals.
See `packages/shared/security/expression_denylist.json`.

runtime.no_session.hint: No game session is running; runtime bridge tools need playmode or a headless child.
steps: Call runtime.start_headless { } (CI/headless) or runtime.play { mode: "current_scene" } in the editor.
Confirm runtime.status reports session.alive: true, then retry.
Same as symbol `headless.binary_missing`; use `--godot-binary` / `TERRAVOLT_GODOT_BINARY`.
`--project` / `TERRAVOLT_PROJECT_PATH` / `headless.start_project(path=...)` must point at root with `project.godot`.
See symbol `headless.spawn_failed`.
See symbol `headless.driver_handshake_failed`.
See symbol `headless.session_busy`.
See symbol `headless.crashed`.
Increase `--request-timeout-ms`, `--headless-op-timeout-ms`, or `--headless-boot-timeout-ms` as appropriate.
Split large workloads into incremental tool calls.
See symbol `headless.disallowed`.
See symbol `editor.not_available`.
See symbol `scene.path_not_found`.
See symbol `editor.no_active_scene`.
See symbol `runtime.no_session`.
